strategy: Hit with Ice; he takes +15% from it and resists Fire 50%.
Do not cast blades, Globals, or Auras on yourself; each one makes Detolli self-buff with a Fireblade or Firespear. Even pet spells trigger it.
Set up with Traps and Feint instead, which do not feed his buff cheat, and note Steal Charm is also safe.
He summons a Scorcher on Round 1 and every two Rounds after; on its Round-2 turn it casts a Mass Fire Prism that can flip your damage to a random school, so time your hit to avoid the prism.
Kill the Scorcher before its Round-3 turn, when it sacrifices itself to give Detolli two power pips.
Stack traps, then finish with one big Ice hit.
cheatNotes: Joining late gets Fuel cast on you; enter on time.
If you cast a blade, Global, or Aura, he answers with a Fireblade (up to +45%) or Firespear on himself; set up with traps instead to avoid pumping his damage.
Even your pet's may-cast blades and Globals set off his self-buff, so watch your pet's casts.
Steal Charm does not trigger the buff, so you can strip a charm safely.
He summons a Scorcher on Round 1 and every second Round; expect a fresh minion to manage.
Its first-round Brimstone Revenant is bugged and passes, so it does nothing.
On Round 2 the Scorcher casts a random Mass Fire Prism that can convert your Ice damage to another school; hit before it lands or plan around the prism.
On Round 3 the Scorcher sacrifices itself to hand Detolli two power pips; kill it before then.
